intro:
Get ready for a delicious gyoza-making challenge!
Make lots of gyoza and watch your food cart prosper!
description:
Let's make gyoza on the Nintendo Switch™!
Serve up plenty of gyoza for your customers, and don't let them burn!
With a Joy-Con™ per player, up to 4 players can join in!
Aim for a new high score!

《Rules》
Cook gyoza and fill customer orders!
Make as many gyoza as you can within the time limit!

《How to Play》
1. Make the filling, wrap it up, then start cooking!

2. Place a lid on the cooker to start cooking the gyoza!

3. Add starch slurry while cooking to make the bottoms nice and crispy!

4. When they're ready, serve the gyoza to your customers! Match the orders exactly to earn more points!

[Score Attack]
Make lots of gyoza and aim for a high spot on the leaderboards!

[Battle]
Compete against others and test your gyoza-making skills!
